name: Bruno Carr
abstract: Edward "Bruno" Carr (February 9, 1928 – October 25, 1993) was an American jazz drummer. Carr was a frequent collaborator with Ray Charles, and he recorded with Aretha Franklin.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Stanley Turrentine, John Klemmer, and Hampton Hawes

works.t: Naked as the Day I Was Born

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: Bruno Carr, who’s from the Bronx originally, played drums. ... So, it was a good band, you know?
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
